what_it_does: Defines an inline SVG icon showing a circular compass mark with a north-pointing arrow shape and an "N" label.
observations: The SVG uses a 24 by 24 viewBox.
The root sets fill="none", stroke="currentColor", stroke-width="1.5", stroke-linecap="round", and stroke-linejoin="round".
A circle is drawn at cx="12", cy="12" with radius 9.
A filled path draws a north arrow using currentColor.
A text element places the letter "N" near the bottom at x="11", y="20" with font-size="4" and font-weight="700".
standouts: Combines a compass circle, directional arrow, and text label in one compact icon.
Uses currentColor so the icon can inherit color from its context.
conventions: Follows common inline SVG icon conventions with a 24x24 viewBox and currentColor styling.
Uses explicit SVG text for the "N" label rather than converting the letter to path geometry.
Mixes stroked outline elements with a filled directional marker.
concerns: The text label may render slightly differently across fonts or SVG renderers.
The SVG has no title, role, or accessible label in the file itself.
notes: A compact north-arrow compass icon built from a circle, filled arrow path, and bottom "N" label.
questions: Should the "N" remain live SVG text or be converted to path data for consistent rendering?
Is accessibility metadata expected to be supplied by the consuming component?
Should the arrow path be filled only, or should it also inherit the root stroke?
Is the bottom "N" intended to be visually centered at this size?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename indicates a north-arrow icon, and the SVG content matches by drawing a circled north marker with an "N" label.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable map or navigation orientation icon that can adopt surrounding UI color.
novelty: The icon includes both a filled compass pointer and a separate SVG text "N" label within the same small 24x24 asset.
contribution: Contributes a color-inheriting north-orientation icon substrate with explicit compass semantics: circular boundary, directional pointer, and textual north marker.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 currentColor SVG north-arrow icon composed of a stroked circle, filled directional arrow path, and bottom "N" text label.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing north orientation or compass direction in an icon set while inheriting color from its UI context.
